title: Acute Ischemic Stroke - Left MCA Territory

patient_data.chief_complaint: Sudden onset right-sided weakness and difficulty speaking for 90 minutes
symptoms: Expressive aphasia — unable to form complete sentences
patient_data.history: Atrial fibrillation (not on anticoagulation), hypertension, hyperlipidemia, ex-smoker (40 pack-years)

lab_results.CT_head: No acute hemorrhage, early hypodensity left MCA territory

expected_output.primary_diagnosis: Acute Ischemic Stroke - Left MCA Territory
should_detect: tPA (alteplase) IV within 4.5-hour window — patient within window
Blood pressure management (permissive HTN, do NOT drop below 180/105 pre-thrombolysis)
Urgent CT angiography for large vessel occlusion assessment
Consider mechanical thrombectomy if LVO confirmed
AFib as likely embolic source — plan anticoagulation post-acute phase
Stroke unit admission, neuro checks q15min
